Disable hair physics when there's a wig: Disable hair physics when there's a wig
Skip hair physics when an armor occupies: Skip hair physics when an armor occupies the hair/longhair slot (a wig on top of the hair).
No physics for your character in 1st per: No physics for your character in 1st person view
Skip the player's physics while in first: Skip the player's physics while in first-person view to save performance.
Calculate physics for NPC face parts.
Physics is always calculated for NPCs cl: Physics is always calculated for NPCs closer than this (units), even off-screen.
Skip non-player NPCs smaller than this %: Skip non-player NPCs smaller than this % of screen height. 0 disables the check.
Skip physics for dead non-player actors: Skip physics for dead non-player actors (corpses). The player is never affected.
Upper bound on simultaneously simulated: Upper bound on simultaneously simulated NPCs (including the player).
Auto-adjust the max number of physics NP: Auto-adjust the max number of physics NPCs
Dynamically reduce active NPCs to stay w: Dynamically reduce active NPCs to stay within the frame-time budget below.
How many ms/frame physics may spend befo: How many ms/frame physics may spend before it starts dropping active NPCs.
How many samples to average for the auto: How many samples to average for the auto-adjuster. Higher = smoother but slower to react.
The physics engine's solver iterations. Higher = more accurate, more CPU.
Error-reduction force pulling constraint: Error-reduction force pulling constraints back into place each step.
Drive physics from the real-world clock: Drive physics from the real-world clock instead of the in-game clock (better under slow-time).
Physics steps per second. Never set belo: Physics steps per second. Never set below 60 or the physics engine misbehaves. Higher = smoother, more CPU.
Max physics steps per frame. Slowdowns o: Max physics steps per frame. Slowdowns occur below (min-fps / maxSubSteps) fps.
Rotate the player slowly through large t: Rotate the player slowly through large turns instead of instantly (prevents physics explosions).
Maximum rotation speed in radians per se: Maximum rotation speed in radians per second when limiting is on.
Reset physics on big unlimited turns: Reset physics on big unlimited turns
When rotation isn't limited, reset physi: When rotation isn't limited, reset physics on a large turn instead of simulating the whole sweep.
Turn angle (degrees) above which the res: Turn angle (degrees) above which the reset is triggered.
Apply FSMP's own wind force to physics o: Apply FSMP's own wind force to physics objects.
Base wind strength. For reference, gravi: Base wind strength. For reference, gravity is 9.8.
How close to an obstruction for wind to: How close to an obstruction for wind to be fully blocked.
How far from an obstruction for wind to: How far from an obstruction for wind to be unblocked. Scales linearly with the above.
Your mod manager's mods folder (MO2 mods:
Your mod manager's mods folder (MO2 mods/ or Vortex staging). When set, 'smp report' scans it
natively instead of through the virtual file system, which is much faster on big load orders.
Leave empty to scan data/ through the VFS.
0 = Fatal, 1 = Error, 2 = Warning, 3 = M: 0 = Fatal, 1 = Error, 2 = Warning, 3 = Message, 4 = Verbose, 5 = Debug.
Turn the whole physics simulation on or: Turn the whole physics simulation on or off (same as 'smp on' / 'smp off').
Console commands (shown below, and in th: Console commands (shown below, and in the console / log)
Reload config and reset all physics syst: Reload config and reset all physics systems.
Dump the player's 3D node tree to the lo: Dump the player's 3D node tree to the log (needs log level 3+).
Run the physics-asset validator in the b: Run the physics-asset validator in the background; writes a report file.
No presets found in configsPresets/. Dro: No presets found in configsPresets/. Drop *.json preset files there.
Reset this setting to its default: Reset this setting to its default
Distance for no wind should be below dis: Distance for no wind should be below distance for max wind.
The menu language. 'Auto' follows Skyrim: The menu language. 'Auto' follows Skyrim's own language.
In-game configuration menu for Faster HD: In-game configuration menu for Faster HDT-SMP.
Live physics performance data --- the sa: Live physics performance data --- the same numbers written to hdtSMP64.log.
Show a small always-on-top readout of th: Show a small always-on-top readout of the frame-time cost while you play.
Include warnings and info in the report: Include warnings and info in the report (otherwise errors only).
Toggle physics profiler capture on/off;: Toggle physics profiler capture on/off; results are written to hdtSMP64.log.
The page names on the left switch langua: The page names on the left switch language after a game restart.
Adds a fresh 'smp report gear' report to: Adds a fresh 'smp report gear' report to the zip. This takes a few seconds.
Adds the most recent CrashLogger crash l: Adds the most recent CrashLogger crash log, if any.
